title: US Government Probes Germany's Drug Pricing Plan
headline: The US government has opened a formal probe into Germany's plan to pay less for drugs, potentially escalating a transatlantic trade dispute.
key_facts: Formal US government probe into Germany's drug pricing reforms; published ~10 hours before June 19; relates to IRA-era international reference pricing tensions

title: Treasury Assessing Investment Screening in China Biotech
headline: U.S. Treasury Department is evaluating mechanisms to screen American investments flowing into Chinese biotech companies.
key_facts: Treasury assessing options for investment screening in China biotech; exclusive from Endpoints; could impact CRO relationships and venture capital flows

title: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton Stepping Down August 15
headline: Pfizer's CFO Dave Denton will depart on August 15, 2026, to return to the consumer goods industry.
key_facts: Dave Denton departing August 15, 2026; interim CFO Cecile Guegan; Pfizer shares slipped Thursday June 18; permanent successor search underway

title: Kardigan IPO Raises $400M, Shares Surge 31%
headline: Heart drug developer Kardigan raised $400 million in an upsized US IPO, with shares rising 31% above the offering price.
key_facts: $400 million raised; shares rose 31% above IPO price; upsized offering; extends biotech IPO streak; five of six largest new biotech offerings since start of 2022

title: Eli Lilly Acquires 4E Therapeutics for Non-Opioid Pain
headline: Eli Lilly acquired 4E Therapeutics, a non-opioid pain biotech, continuing its acquisition spree.
key_facts: Lilly acquisition of 4E Therapeutics for non-opioid pain; Lilly has sunk more than $18 billion into acquisitions over past few years; no deal value specified

title: FDA Approves Label Expansion for Merck's Capvaxive
headline: The FDA approved an expanded label for Merck's pneumococcal vaccine Capvaxive.
key_facts: FDA approved expanded label for Capvaxive on June 18; pneumococcal vaccine

title: Edgewise Heart Drug Passes Key HCM Trial
headline: Edgewise Biosciences' heart drug passed a key clinical trial test in hypertrophic cardiomyopathy.
key_facts: Positive efficacy in hypertrophic cardiomyopathy Phase trial; differentiation from competitors remains debated; competes with Bristol Myers' mavacamten/Camzyos and Cytokinetics' aficamten

title: FTC Requires Aurobindo to Divest 4 Drugs for Lannett Acquisition
headline: The FTC is requiring Aurobindo Pharma to divest four drug products as a condition of completing its acquisition of Lannett Company.
key_facts: 4 drug products must be divested; FTC regulatory condition; June 18, 3:45pm publication

title: Traws Pharma Drops 18.2% on Deferred Influenza Study
headline: Traws Pharma (NASDAQ: TRAW) fell 18.2% to $1.05 in pre-market after deferring its Phase 2a influenza study due to negative MHRA review.
key_facts: TRAW stock fell 18.2% to $1.05; Phase 2a study of tivoxavir marboxil deferred; negative review from UK MHRA

title: Sanofi Halts Immune Drug Trial
headline: Sanofi has halted an immune drug clinical trial in a setback for the company.
key_facts: Sanofi halted immune drug clinical trial; no specific drug name or indication disclosed

title: cAMPfield Launches with $180M for Gut Disease Drug
headline: Startup cAMPfield has raised $180 million to develop a gut disease drug.
key_facts: $180 million raised in financing for gut disease drug development

title: Moderna Flu Vaccine Gets Unanimous FDA Panel Support
headline: FDA vaccine advisory committee unanimously backed Moderna's flu vaccine mFlusiva, positioning company for dramatic turnaround after earlier FDA refusal.
key_facts: Unanimous VRBPAC vote; PDUFA date August 5, 2026; bucking past FDA leadership decisions; potential first non-COVID commercial product for Moderna
